Live · WebGL · Draco-compressed mesh

418-frame reconstruction — examine the mesh.

The dense (~50 %-of-video) median-depth TSDF mesh, delivered as the actual Draco-compressed .drc (688 KB) embedded and decoded in your browser. Flat-shaded so you judge geometry, not texture. Drag = orbit · shift-drag = pan · scroll = zoom.
